description.en: Graduated with honors. Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and distributed systems. Thesis on 'Further Development of the Outcome-Based Education Information System at the Faculty of Engineering, UNS.'
description.id: Lulus dengan predikat cumlaude. Berfokus pada rekayasa perangkat lunak, algoritma, dan sistem terdistribusi. Skripsi tentang 'Pengembangan Lanjut Sistem Informasi Outcome Based Education pada Fakultas Teknik UNS.'

en: Youngest graduate of graduation in July 2023 period
id: Lulusan termuda pada wisuda periode Juli 2023

description.en: Graduated in 2nd year. Active in mathematics olympiads. Participated in OSN (IT category).
description.id: Lulus pada tahun ke-2. Aktif dalam olimpiade matematika. Berpartisipasi dalam OSN (kategori TI).

en: Participated in photography and design club
id: Berpartisipasi dalam klub fotografi dan desain
